warm_up:
Activation & Mobilisation Drills:
1 round PVC pipe
30sec e/s PVC Shoulder Opener
5 PVC Around the Worlds each way
5 PVC Pass Throughs
10 Band Row Rotate Press
10 Worlds Greatest Stretch
10 Cossack Squat
10 Broad Jumps
2 rounds (PVC/Barbell):
3 Muscle Clean
3 Clean Pull
3 Hang Power Clean
10 Front Squat

strength.name: Front Squat
strength.description:
2x2 | * Breathe and brace at the top of each rep
* Elbows Up
* Keep knees out | BUILD 5 Sets E3MOM
00:00 3 @ 50%
03:00 3 @ 60%
06:00 3 @ 70%
09:00 2 @ 80%
12:00 2 @ 85-90%
HOLD 2 Sets E4MOM
16:00 2 @ 95%
20:00 2 @ 95%

strength.name: Power Clean
strength.description:
1x2 | * Focus on triple extension
* Fast Elbows | E3MOM 15min
Work Up to a Top Set of 2. Increase weight if it is feeling good or dial it in for another set.
00:00 2
03:00 2
06:00 2
09:00 2
12:00 2

metcon.name: Workout
metcon.description:
12-9-6-3
Hang Power cleans
Burpee over Bar
Rx @ 60/40
Rx+ @ 70/45

hypertrophy.reasoning: Lower body and pressing are heavily taxed; posterior chain and pulling work balance fatigue without competing for recovery.

siri_text: Friday's workout. Strength: Front Squat, 2 by 2 at 95 percent. Strength: Power Clean, 1 by 2. Metcon: Workout: 12-9-6-3, Hang Power cleans, Burpee over Bar. For hypertrophy, focus on back, biceps, rear delts.
